title: Voters deleted during WB SIR higher than winning margin: TMC's Kalyan Banerjee to Supreme Court
description: The number of voters deleted during the West Bengal Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of the electoral roll exceeded the vote difference between a winning BJP candidate and a losing TMC candidate in the recently concluded State Assembly polls, Senior Advocate Kalyan Banerjee told the Supreme Court today. The Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi was hearing petitions challenging the SIR exercise in West Bengal.CJI Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya BagchiIn his
